title: Latch
lyrics:
82 ContributorsTranslationsFrançaisLatch LyricsWith its full-bodied vocals, “Latch” sums up the delirious feeling of falling head over heels in love with someone.
Showstopping, indelible and effusive—not to mention successful! It hit 11 in the UK and… Read More
